name: YENI_NUMARA
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[YENI_NUMARA] @num NVARCHAR(100),
@DNN NVARCHAR(100) OUTPUT 

as
SET NOCOUNT ON
        DECLARE @uzunluk AS NUMERIC(38) SET @uzunluk=0
        DECLARE @SSS AS NVARCHAR(100)
        SET @SSS = ''
        SET @uzunluk = Len(@num)
        If @uzunluk = 0 BEGIN SET @num = 1  goto sn END
        DECLARE @X NUMERIC(38) DECLARE @Y NUMERIC(38) DECLARE @L NVARCHAR(100) SET @X=0 SET @Y=0
        SET @L = @num
        DECLARE @XX NUMERIC(38) DECLARE @HANE NVARCHAR(100) DECLARE @KRK1 NVARCHAR(100) DECLARE @KRK2 NVARCHAR(100) DECLARE @XXX NUMERIC(38)
        SET @XX = 0  SET @KRK1 = '' SET @KRK2 = '' SET @XXX=0
BS1:
        SET @XX = @XX + 1
        SET @XX = Convert(NUMERIC(38),@XX)
        SET @HANE =  SUBSTRING(@L, @XX, 1)
        SET @XXX = IsNumeric(@HANE)
        If @HANE <> '-' BEGIN 
            If @XXX = 0 BEGIN 
                SET @KRK1 = @KRK1 + @HANE
            END Else BEGIN
                SET @KRK2 = @KRK2 + @HANE
            End 
            If Len(@L) = @XX GoTo gg
            GoTo BS1
        END Else BEGIN
            SET @KRK1 = @KRK1 + '-'
            If Len(@L) > @XX  GoTo BS1  
		END
gg:
        If @KRK2 = ''  BEGIN SET @num = @KRK1  goto sn END
        SET @Y = Convert(NUMERIC(38),@KRK2)
        SET @X = Len(@KRK2)
        SET @Y = @Y + 1
		
        DECLARE @Z NUMERIC(38) SET @Z=0
        SET @Z = Len( RTRIM(LTrim(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(200),@Y))) )
        SET @X = @X - @Z

        If @X < 0  GoTo CC
BS:
        If Len(@SSS) = @X BEGIN
            GoTo CC
        END Else BEGIN
            SET @SSS = @SSS + '0'
			
            GoTo BS
        End 
CC:
        SET @SSS = @KRK1 + @SSS + LTrim(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(200),@Y))
		
        SET @num = @SSS
		
sn:
        If @num = '1' SET @num = '0000001'

SET @DNN= @num
